characters.appearance: Young woman in her 20s with a fair complexion, long wavy brown hair, and green eyes. She has a small nose ring on her left nostril.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved top with lace detailing. She wears several rings on her fingers and a gold pendant necklace.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English fluency का सबसे आसान तरीका। [The easiest way to English fluency.]
Character A says: ये मैं हूँ, छह महीने पहले। [This is me, six months ago.]
Character A says: Uh... myself... I am coming from... [Uh... myself... I am coming from...]
Character A says: और ये मैं आज हूँ। [And this is me today.]
Character A says: I'd love to walk you through my portfolio and discuss how I can add value to your team. [I'd love to walk you through my portfolio and discuss how I can add value to your team.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable "before and after" transformation.
- Establishes credibility by showing tangible progress from broken, hesitant English to professional fluency.
- Creates an aspirational emotion for the learner who wants to ace interviews.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English fluency का तरीका
six months ago:
MYSELF
I AM
And this is me today:
PORTFOLIO
VALUE
TEAM

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलिए बताती हूँ कैसे। [Let me tell you how.]
Character A says: मैं Supernova app यूज़ करती हूँ। [I use the Supernova app.]
Character A says: इसमें AI tutor के साथ daily speaking practice और roleplay जैसे features हैं। [It has features like daily speaking practice and roleplay with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: तो आप सिर्फ grammar नहीं रटते, बल्कि real life situations—जैसे interview या office—के लिए English बोलना सीखते हैं। [So you don't just memorize grammar, but learn to speak English for real life situations—like an interview or office.]
Character A says: चाहे दिन के बस दस मिनट हों, रोज़ practice करना सबसे ज़रूरी है। [Even if it's just ten minutes a day, practicing daily is the most important thing.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to the user's speaking anxiety.
- Highlights key brand features like the AI tutor and real-life roleplay (interviews/office).
- Encourages daily practice in a warm, non-intimidating way.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
कैसे करें
Supernova app
AI tutor
roleplay
सिर्फ grammar नहीं
real life situations
interview या office
रोज़ practice
सबसे ज़रूरी

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear call-to-action.
- Reinforces brand identity with the Supernova logo.
- Prompts immediate action without relying on free trial gimmicks.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
आज ही अपनी English speaking journey शुरू करें।

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: आज ही अपनी English speaking journey शुरू करें।
